name: Conversor
js:
AppManager.register('converter',{init:function(b,win){b.innerHTML='
Conversor de Unidades
';b.className='p-16 flex-col';var units={temp:{name:'Temperatura',units:['Celsius','Fahrenheit','Kelvin'],conv:{Celsius:{Fahrenheit:function(v){return v*9/5+32},Kelvin:function(v){return v+273.15}},Fahrenheit:{Celsius:function(v){return(v-32)*5/9},Kelvin:function(v){return(v-32)*5/9+273.15}},Kelvin:{Celsius:function(v){return v-273.15},Fahrenheit:function(v){return(v-273.15)*9/5+32}}}},length:{name:'Comprimento',units:['Metros','Centimetros','Polegadas','Pes'],conv:{Metros:{Centimetros:function(v){return v*100},Polegadas:function(v){return v*39.3701},Pes:function(v){return v*3.28084}},Centimetros:{Metros:function(v){return v/100},Polegadas:function(v){return v/2.54},Pes:function(v){return v/30.48}},Polegadas:{Metros:function(v){return v/39.3701},Centimetros:function(v){return v*2.54},Pes:function(v){return v/12}},Pes:{Metros:function(v){return v/3.28084},Centimetros:function(v){return v*30.48},Polegadas:function(v){return v*12}}}},weight:{name:'Peso',units:['Quilogramas','Gramas','Libras','Oncas'],conv:{Quilogramas:{Gramas:function(v){return v*1000},Libras:function(v){return v*2.20462},Oncas:function(v){return v*35.274}},Gramas:{Quilogramas:function(v){return v/1000},Libras:function(v){return v/453.592},Oncas:function(v){return v/28.3495}},Libras:{Quilogramas:function(v){return v/2.20462},Gramas:function(v){return v*453.592},Oncas:function(v){return v*16}},Oncas:{Quilogramas:function(v){return v/35.274},Gramas:function(v){return v*28.3495},Libras:function(v){return v/16}}}}};var typeSel=TK.byId('cv-type');var fromSel=TK.byId('cv-from');var valIn=TK.byId('cv-val');var resultIn=TK.byId('cv-result');var eqEl=TK.byId('cv-eq');function populateFrom(){var cat=units[typeSel.value];TK.empty(fromSel);cat.units.forEach(function(u){var opt=document.createElement('option');opt.value=u;opt.textContent=u;fromSel.appendChild(opt)});convert()}function convert(){var cat=units[typeSel.value];var from=fromSel.value;var val=parseFloat(valIn.value)||0;var conv=cat.conv[from];if(!conv){resultIn.value='';eqEl.textContent='';return}var results=[];cat.units.forEach(function(to){if(to===from)return;if(conv[to]){var r=conv[to](val);results.push(to+': '+r.toFixed(4))}});resultIn.value=results[0]?results[0].split(': ')[1]:'';eqEl.textContent=from+': '+val.toFixed(2)+' = '+results.join(' | ')}typeSel.onchange=function(){populateFrom()};fromSel.onchange=convert;valIn.oninput=convert;populateFrom()}})
